title: Jupiter
summary: Jupiter is one of Solana's largest trading surfaces, spanning swap routing, perps, terminal tooling, prediction markets, lending, and more. Arcium currently positions Jupiter as part of its DeFi ecosystem rather than as a public, deeply documented Arcium integration.
description:
Jupiter calls itself the home of onchain finance and documents a broad product surface that includes Swap and Ultra, Perps and JLP, Terminal, Predict, Lend, wallets, launch tools, and onramp products. That breadth makes it a useful reference point for where confidential execution, private order flow, or encrypted coordination could matter most on Solana.

Arcium's Encrypted Ecosystem article lists Jupiter among DeFi ecosystem partners. I did not find a current Jupiter source that explains a specific Arcium-powered feature or rollout, so this record should be treated as ecosystem coverage rather than a confirmed integration.

bodySections.title: Why_It_Matters
bodySections.body: Jupiter matters because it sits close to Solana's retail and pro trading flow at the same time. Official user docs now cover swapping, perpetuals, prediction markets, lending, token launches, wallets, and onramp tools, which makes Jupiter a meaningful benchmark for what encrypted market structure could eventually touch.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium publicly lists Jupiter as part of its DeFi ecosystem. That is enough to keep Jupiter in Atlas, but it is not enough to present the relationship as a confirmed integration. Until Jupiter publishes a specific Arcium-related workflow, the safest framing is ecosystem project with medium confidence.

statusNote: Arcium lists Jupiter as a DeFi ecosystem partner, but I did not find a current Jupiter-published source describing a specific Arcium integration.
